subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-28
subcodes.first_line: I never dreamed to buy land around the Lake of Galilee and by the river Jordan, but the Blessed Perfection commanded me to do so, in consideration of their biblical sacredness
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @business; financial; property matters
